text:
Once upon a time in a quaint village surrounded by woods darker than midnight, there lived a quirky owl named Willow. She hated feathers. Anything feather-touch. Owlish glasses couldn fluttered wildly whenever something scary rustled dead leaves.

One cloudy late autumn afternoon, Willow heard strange whispers through owl owlhoot circle. Something ancient beckoned!

She flew west. Along ancient owl paths.

An owl swooped down!

A shadow moved.

Across seas?

Into mysterious lore?

Willow liked stories.

So she soared.

Yearspassed.

A strange book.

Old stories grew.




Falcon.

A hawk.

Whispered stars.




A dragon.

Something quiet.

She loved it.

At night.

With her tail.

She read quietly.

Dragon dreams.

Dream stars.

You know?

Just you.


It felt right. True stuff.



So she slept.

Now every night.

At the stars.

I love you.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
